top_signals.title: EM’s Record Rally Leads Two Hedge Funds to Turn Away Investors
top_signals.summary: There’s so much cash going to emerging markets that a pair of hedge funds that specialize in hard-to-reach debt are starting to turn away investors.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
